import{useState,useEffect}from"react";import{useToast}from"../../context/ToastContext";import PageHeader from"../../components/shared/PageHeader";import DataTable from"../../components/shared/DataTable";import Badge from"../../components/shared/Badge";import{ngoApi}from"../../services/api";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function NGOsPage(){const toast=useToast();const[ngos,setNgos]=useState([]);const[fetching,setFetching]=useState(true);useEffect(()=>{ngoApi.getAll().then(res=>setNgos(res.data||[])).catch(()=>toast("Failed to load NGOs","error")).finally(()=>setFetching(false));},[]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(PageHeader,{title:"All NGOs",desc:"Non-governmental organizations on the platform"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"card",children:fetching?/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{style:{color:"var(--text-muted)"},children:"Loading\u2026"}):/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(DataTable,{columns:[{key:"id",label:"NGO ID",mono:true},{key:"name",label:"Organization"},{key:"focus",label:"Focus Area"},{key:"admin",label:"Admin Email"},{key:"funds",label:"Funds"},{key:"verified",label:"Status",render:r=>r.verified?/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Badge,{type:"green",children:"Verified"}):/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Badge,{type:"red",children:"Pending"})}],data:ngos})})]});}
